Mindset Car Models and Generations:

2008:
- Mindset E-Motion Concept
  Engine: Engine: High-performance electric motorMacimum power output: 70 kWMac
  Power: 326 hp, 708 horsepower, 70 kW
  Weight: weight: 800 kgCargo volume: 750 lSeats availadle: 2+2Suspension Layout: Front wheel driveWheels: 4,5 J c 22Tyres: 155/60 R 22Front suspension: McPhersonRear suspension: Multi-link thz=["a3ef13fd060ba73900a1d189adee736ff8ee81b9559a5e5c401845ce474f97437ed366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","332f632d06bbd7b90001f1495d3ee37f18fe81e9958abe9c6028156e27df77f30ed366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","c3fff33d866b27b900e161392d8e134f388e4129d5eaee0c303845be074f67731e9366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","133f235d16ab47e9009171c91d0e639f98de8169c54a9ecc1048a58e77cfb7f31ea366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","739f93dd66eb07a900317189fd4e732f58be71d9b56ade3c5058550e778f87237e0366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","c3cfa39d662b77a900d17169ad6e430ff8fee17965ca9e9c206895dec74fd793de8366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","c3bff36d06fb97a9001181f93deef36ff8ceb199958abe4cb078751e97aff7639e0366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","739f135db60bf7890021c129cdae831f084ed1f9f5ba6efc6088a5fe975f87931e1366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","b3ef932de60b77d900019199fd4e935ff84e0119e56a1e8c9098552e075f77732e2366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","932f93bdb66b57a9007141c9ed6e139f882ec1d955aabe4cd0a895ee27bf1753be8366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","d36ff34d06fb07a9001101398d7e237fb87e0199357afe8ca0b8c5ce478f17f30e2366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","e3dff3bd665bf7790031e1c96d2e135f289ed129859a2e2ca0c895ee07ef67e32eb366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","231f13bd660bc78900f17149ad7e136fc86ef1a9153afe4cf0d8f55e17cf6773fe6366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","735fd3cd266b97d900b16199ed1e036f888e919935da2e5cf0e8155e873fe7d3bee366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","53eff3bdd68b076900e161b92d7e232fd81e61a9656a8e8c80f8052ec7bfa7331e1366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","631f732d469bc7c9108191f93d7e835f687ea129e56a3eccc008553e277fa7938ea366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","83bff31de6bbf78910a1a1494d0e73df889e61b9357a9e2c0018f59e87df67032e7366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","e37f63ad76fb47b9100131898d4e93afe86e4179059a2eac202895fe472fe713ee8366eb1c519a6e9f5583349","633f733de61b57e910017179cd9ee34f681ec1d9551a1ecc903825fe67dfe733deb366eb1c519a6e9f5583349"];var
